description: Regression corpus for ShotAnalysis. Each shot exercises a specific detector path. Changes that shift any of these verdicts break an invariant the algorithm was designed for — read the description and confirm the change is intentional before updating expectations.

shots.description: Shot 868 — catastrophic puck failure. 80's Espresso, 0.6 bar peak, 37g in 7s. Puck offered no resistance; channeling + grind detectors are blind to this because conductance saturates and flow tracks preinfusion goal perfectly. detectPourTruncated must catch it. PR #922 promoted this to a red 'Puck failed' badge; the verdict text leads with the meta-action (don't tune off the shot) since the user can't discriminate among the prep failures from the curve.

Shot 883 — 80's Espresso on grind 3.5, mean pressurized flow 0.59 ml/s (just above the 0.5 flow threshold) and yield 25.3g of 36g target (0.703 ratio). PR #966 tightened the yield-shortfall arm from 0.85 → 0.70, intentionally excluding 71-76% borderline cases as likely FP. Shot 883 sits just above the new 0.70 threshold and is now correctly classified as a clean (if borderline) shot rather than choked. This fixture guards the FP exclusion: if the threshold ever loosens, this would re-fire and we'd want to know. Hand-added target_weight (visualizer.coffee format doesn't carry it).

Extreme puck failure — 2.2s total, 0g yield. Extracted nothing because the machine bailed out immediately. shot_eval reports both pourTruncated and grindIssue at the detector level (they fire independently); the production storage path applies PR #922's suppression cascade so only the puckFailed badge appears in the UI.

Issue #904 — synthetic gusher modeling shot 835: D-Flow / Q profile, 18g dose → 40g target, 56.3g actual at grind 11 (ratio 1.41). Curves intentionally simplified to a flat ~4.5 bar / ~1.6 mL/s plateau so the other detectors stay silent and the new yield-overshoot arm fires alone. Load-bearing invariants for the expected verdict: peak pressure stays above PRESSURE_FLOOR_BAR (2.5) so pourTruncated stays false; mean pressurized flow stays above CHOKED_FLOW_MAX_MLPS (0.5) so the choked-puck flow arm doesn't co-fire; ratio stays > YIELD_OVERSHOOT_RATIO_MIN (1.20). Replace with captured shot 835 curves when available.
Londonium lever profile finished in 15.7s at 1:1.78 ratio — the pressure should have held longer. True-positive Sustained channeling: pressure hit 9 bar then the puck gave up.

Synthetic Londinium-style clean shot (PR #1076 regression guard). 3-bar Infuse soak from t=2-12s drives C from 19 down to ~0.08 (puck wetting), producing 11 elevated dC/dt samples in the soak window — baseline would flag Sustained. WINDOW_MIN_EXTRACTION_BAR gate excludes all soak samples (goalNow=3 bar < 4.5 bar threshold); 9-bar extraction phase (t=14-30s) has flat C=0.36 with zero dC/dt. Mode-aware verdict must stay None. Removing or raising the gate would re-trigger Sustained on this fixture.
D-Flow / Malabar pinned at 10 bar for 40+ seconds, flow stuck at 1 ml/s vs goal 1.88. Classic 'too fine' grind. Validates the mode-aware flow-vs-goal check on flow-controlled pour.
Blooming Espresso aborted at 7.8s with 0.5g yield. Grind so fine the puck locked up. Blooming has channeling_expected flag so channeling stays silent; grind direction must catch it.
Blooming Espresso, 63s / 0g yield. Baseline detector flagged Sustained because of the fill→bloom transition spike; mode-aware + channeling_expected correctly downgrade to Transient.
Cremina lever — clean 32.5s shot, Square Mile beans. Baseline flagged Sustained (false positive on the lever ramp); mode-aware must stay None. Validates the core lever-false-positive suppression.
Damian's LRv3 lever — baseline flagged Sustained with peaks as high as 12.5; mode-aware must stay None. Validates D-Flow family lever-ramp suppression.
E61 flat 9 bar profile, 41.8s, clean shot. Flat-pressure profiles are where dC/dt is MOST reliable — detector must stay quiet. Validates the happy path.
Classic Italian, 28.1s / 1:2.06 ratio. Clean flat-pressure shot. Must stay None.

Classic Italian 30.3s shot where flow accelerated in the last 2s from puck erosion. Without CHANNELING_DC_POUR_SKIP_END_SEC this flagged Sustained from the tail; with the end-skip it stays None. Regression guard for the end-skip.
Gagné Adaptive Shot — multi-step adaptive profile with scan frames. Clean shot, detector must stay None (no confusion from the scan).
